abstraction.design_system_summary: A clean, professional design system utilizing a neutral color palette with a strong primary blue accent. Typography relies on a system-ui sans-serif stack for readability. Spacing follows a 4px/8px base scale. Surfaces utilize subtle borders and soft shadows to create depth, with a focus on high-contrast text and interactive hover states.
component_taxonomy: Header: Sticky container with logo, nav-links, and auth-cta
Hero: Full-width section with centered typography and call-to-action
ProductCard: Surface component with image placeholder, title, price, and hover-shadow effect
ProductGrid: Responsive container using CSS grid with auto-fit/fill logic
Footer: Multi-column layout for institutional links and copyright
Button: Primary/Secondary variants with hover state transitions
information_architecture: Root: Main layout wrapper with sticky header
Home: Hero section followed by ProductGrid
Auth: Modal or separate route for Login Access
interaction_model: Header: Sticky scroll behavior with backdrop-blur
ProductCard: Scale or shadow-depth increase on hover
Navigation: Smooth scroll or route transition
Auth: Toggle state for login modal visibility
supported_scope_notes: Use CSS Grid for responsive layout to avoid heavy dependency on external UI libraries
Implement sticky header using position: sticky and z-index management
Ensure color tokens are defined as CSS variables for easy theme adjustment
generation_priorities: Define CSS variables for colors, spacing, and typography
Construct the global layout wrapper with sticky header
Implement the ProductCard component with hover states
Assemble the Hero and Footer sections
